title: Home
text:
Hi, I’m Alina Chen.
I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University while building professional experience across analytics, marketing, business strategy, and customer growth.
Having studied and worked in the United States, France, and China, I have developed a global perspective on business, data-driven decision making, and cross-cultural communication.
My goal is to combine analytics, technology, and business strategy to help organizations solve complex problems and drive sustainable growth.





Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics Expected Graduation: August 2026
Relevant Areas:

Data Analytics
Business Intelligence
Data Visualization
Predictive Modeling
Machine Learning




Bachelor of Business Administration
International Marketing and Sales Management







Peninsula Montessori Academy – Boston, USA

Analyze customer and enrollment data to identify growth opportunities.
Build dashboards and executive reports for operational decision-making.
Optimize lead generation, conversion funnels, and customer acquisition strategies.
Improve customer experience through analytics-driven insights.




Detecon Consulting – Guangzhou, China

Conduct market research and competitive intelligence projects.
Analyze large-scale business datasets using Excel and SQL.
Deliver strategic recommendations and executive-level business reports.
Support operational optimization and business transformation initiatives.




Sisyphus Training – Paris, France

Designed and executed digital marketing campaigns.
Conducted customer behavior analysis and retention optimization.
Managed CRM systems and customer segmentation initiatives.
Supported business growth through data-driven marketing strategies.




Sinocom Voyage – Paris, France

Supported international marketing campaigns and content strategy.
Conducted customer engagement and partnership development initiatives.
Assisted in go-to-market planning and digital marketing execution.

My current interests include:

title: Projects
text:
Below are selected projects that reflect my interests in business strategy, analytics, marketing, and technology.





Designed and developed a responsive website to present company research, product insights, and market positioning in an engaging and interactive format.
Highlights:

Built using modern web technologies
Structured competitive and product intelligence
Visual storytelling and dashboard-style presentation
Improved ability to communicate technical information

Skills:
HTML · CSS · JavaScript · Research · Market Intelligence
Website:
https://intersystems-intelligence.vercel.app/







Conducted exploratory analysis on employment and hiring patterns using large datasets.
Research Questions:

How do hiring patterns differ across industries?
What factors influence workforce participation?

Methods:

Data cleaning
Exploratory analysis
Visualization
Statistical interpretation

Tools:
Python · SQL · GitHub · Data Visualization

Examples:

Community outreach strategy

Customer conversion tracking

CRM · Analytics · Digital Marketing

title: About You
text:
I am currently completing my Master’s degree at Boston University and preparing to begin my professional career in the United States.
My academic and professional experiences across Asia, Europe, and North America have shaped how I think about business: meaningful growth happens when data, people, and strategy work together.
Over the past few years, I have worked across marketing, sales, business development, and market research environments, gaining experience in customer engagement, campaign execution, market analysis, and cross-functional collaboration.
I enjoy turning fragmented information into clear insights and helping teams make better decisions.






Master’s Degree
Expected Graduation: August 2026
Relevant Areas: - Business Analytics - Marketing Strategy - Data Visualization - Customer Insights - Market Intelligence



Bachelor’s Degree in International Business
Highlights: - International learning environment - Cross-cultural collaboration - Global business perspective







Worked closely with customer acquisition, community outreach, event coordination, and marketing performance analysis.



Conducted industry research, analyzed business information, created executive presentations, and transformed large amounts of information into actionable recommendations.



Developed communication, relationship management, and problem-solving capabilities through direct interaction with customers and stakeholders.





Data & Analytics
Python · SQL · Excel · Tableau · Power BI
Marketing
CRM · Campaign Analysis · Market Research · Content Strategy
Business
Presentation Design · Competitive Intelligence · Project Management




Outside of work, I enjoy exploring cities, learning languages, building creative side projects, and continuously discovering new industries and ideas.
I believe curiosity and execution are equally important—and I hope this portfolio reflects both.
